zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Tracy於1085年出生在英國米德萊可維斯特明斯特時，他的父親Henry I King of England18歲，母親Gieva de Tracy17歲。他和Alice de Normandie至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1162年在英國戴文布拉德寧其享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Tracy于1085年出生在英国米德萊可維斯特明斯特时，他的父亲Henry I King of England18岁，母亲Gieva de Tracy17岁。他和Alice de Normandie至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1162年在英国戴文布拉德寧其享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Tracy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish name.

variants.name: Tracey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tracy‐Bocage or Tracy‐sur‐Mer (Calvados).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Tracy was born in 1085, in Westminster, Middlesex, England, his father, Henry I King of England, was 18 and his mother, Gieva de Tracy, was 17. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Alice de Normandie. He died about 1162, in Bradninch, Devon, England, at the age of 78.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Tracy est né en 1085, à Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, son père, Henry I King of England, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Gieva de Tracy, avait 17 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Alice de Normandie. Il est décédé environ 1162, à Bradninch, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Tracy 1085 in Westminster, Middlesex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry I King of England 18 und seine Mutter Gieva de Tracy 17. Er hatte mit Alice de Normandie mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1162 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Bradninch, Devon, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Tracy è nato il nel 1085 nel Westminster, Middlesex, England, il suo padre, Henry I King of England, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Gieva de Tracy, aveva 17 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Alice de Normandie. Morì circa 1162, nel Bradninch, Devon, England, all'età di 78 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Tracyが1085年にイギリスミッドレセックスウエストミンスターで生まれた時，父Henry I King of Englandは18歳，母Gieva de Tracyは17歳であった。彼はAlice de Normandieとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1162年にイギリスデボンブラドニンチで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Tracy(이)가 1085년 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry I King of England(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Gieva de Tracy(은)는 17세였다. 그는 Alice de Normandie(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1162년 영국 데폰 브라드닌치에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Bradninch, Tiverton, Devon, England: Bradninch, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Tracy nasceu em 1085, em Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry I King of England, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Gieva de Tracy, tinha 17 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Alice de Normandie. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1162, em Bradninch, Devon, Inglaterra, com 78 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Tracy родился в 1085 г. в местности вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry I King of England было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Gieva de Tracy, 17. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Alice de Normandie. Он умер около 1162 г. в местности браднинч, девон, Англия в возрасте 78 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Tracy nació en 1085, en Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry I King of England, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Gieva de Tracy, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Alice de Normandie. Murió aproximadamente 1162, en Bradninch, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 78 años.
